name: Pre-Launch Checklist
description: Itemized tasks from T-8 weeks through T-1 day covering strategy lock, alpha/beta gates, content finalization, supporter coordination, and technical readiness
best_for: Planning a launch timeline; preparing strategy and messaging; managing alpha/beta gates; coordinating supporters before launch day

name: Launch Day Checklist
description: Minute-by-minute execution plan for a full Tier 1 / Product Hunt launch day with monitoring dashboard
best_for: Executing launch day; coordinating real-time activities across channels; monitoring Product Hunt ranking and metrics

name: Post-Launch Checklist
description: Day 1 through Week 4 tasks covering capture, conversion, activation, retention, and performance reporting
best_for: Managing post-launch follow-up; driving activation of new signups; measuring launch performance; consolidating learnings

name: Per-Channel Content Checklist
description: Content requirements and quality checks for every channel in a Tier 1 launch: email, blog, X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, Product Hunt, press, and communities
best_for: Creating launch content for specific channels; auditing content completeness per channel; quality-checking launch assets

name: Ongoing Announcement Cadence
description: Repeatable checklists for Tier 2 monthly feature launches, Tier 3 weekly patches, and quarterly major announcements
best_for: Planning recurring feature announcements; maintaining launch momentum post-initial launch; deciding launch tier for updates

name: Launch Content Templates
description: Detailed templates and structures for blog posts, email announcements, social posts per platform, and press releases
best_for: Writing launch content from templates; drafting blog posts; emails; social threads; or press releases for a launch
